content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the ActionPages feature at /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages thoroughly. 

For this exploration:
1. List the directory structure
2. Identify all major sub-features (e.g., public action page rendering, action page creation/editing, A/B testing, donation forms, payment flows, etc.)
3. Look for forms, payment integrations, multi-step flows, complex UI components
4. Note any complex business logic or third-party integrations (Stripe, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Plaid, etc.)
5. Estimate roughly how many components and lines of code are involved
6. Note any builder/editor functionality

Return a comprehensive summary of: 
- Major feature buckets within ActionPages
- Complexity indicators (form complexity, payment integrations, validation, etc.)
- Approximate code volume per major sub-feature

Be very thorough. This is a complex donation/fundraising platform.
</user_query>

Exploring the ActionPages codebase: mapping structure, searching integrations, and estimating scale.

[REDACTED]

input.description: Count TS files and total lines under ActionPages

input.command: for dir in ActionPages ActionPagesBuilder PublicActionPage PublicActionPageConfirmation Submissions Events StoreProducts Products Events; do echo -n "$dir: "; find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages/pages/$dir" \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '; echo -n "${dir}_lines "; find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages/pages/$dir" \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1; done && echo root_components: $(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages" -maxdepth 1 \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) | wc -l)
input.description: Per-subfolder TS file counts and line totals

input.command: for d in ActionPages ActionPagesBuilder PublicActionPage PublicActionPageConfirmation Submissions Events StoreProducts Products; do n=$(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages/pages/$d" -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); l=$(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages/pages/$d" -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf "%20s files=%4s lines=%8s\n" "$d" "$n" "$l"; done && n=$(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) | wc -l); l=$(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) -print0 | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | wc -l); printf "%20s files=%4s lines=%8s\n" "ActionPages(root)" "$n" "$l"
input.description: Line counts per major ActionPages subdirectory
Total LOC for tracked ts/tsx under ActionPages via wc

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && for p in "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Events" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/StoreProducts" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPages" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Submissions" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Products" "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPageConfirmation"; do fc=$(git ls-files "$p/\*.tsx" "$p/\*.ts" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "--- $p --- files: $fc"; git ls-files "$p/" | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1; done && echo "--- root routes ---" && git ls-files "src/pages/ActionPages/\*.tsx" "src/pages/ActionPages/\*.ts" | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1
input.description: LOC per ActionPages sub-area using git-tracked files

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Events/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/StoreProducts/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPages/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Submissions/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Products/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPageConfirmation/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs wc -l | tail -1 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/' | rg '^src/pages/ActionPages/(useActionPagesRoutes|pages/index)' | xargs wc -l
input.description: Per-folder line counts via git ls-files and wc

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && tally() { pref="$1"; n=0; l=0; while IFS= read -r f; do [ -n "$f" ] && n=$((n+1)) && ll=$(wc -l <"$f"); l=$((l+ll)); done; echo "$pref files=$n lines=$l"; }; tally ActionPagesBuilder < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally PublicActionPage < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally Events < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Events/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally StoreProducts < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/StoreProducts/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally IndexActionPages_list < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPages/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally Submissions < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Submissions/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally Products < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/Products/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally PublicActionPageConfirmation < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPageConfirmation/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$')
input.description: Sum lines per folder without xargs batch limits

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | rg -v '^src/pages/ActionPages/pages/' | while read f; do wc -l <"$f"; done | awk '{s+=$1} END {print "root_non_pages_lines", s}'
input.description: Line count for ActionPages excluding pages/ subtree

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && for sub in Designer/components Designer/Design Designer/Finance Designer/Form Designer/Workflows Designer/Help Settings Templates components Preview WorkflowsPreview; do tally(){ n=0;l=0; while read f; do [ -z "$f" ]&&continue; n=$((n+1)); l=$((l+$(wc -l <"$f"))); done; echo "$sub: files=$n lines=$l"; }; tally < <(git ls-files "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/$sub/" | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); done

cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && tally(){ sub="$1"; n=0;l=0; while read f; do [ -z "$f" ]&&continue; n=$((n+1)); l=$((l+$(wc -l <"$f"))); done; echo "$sub: files=$n lines=$l"; }; tally 'components/Preview' < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally 'components/WorkflowsPreview' < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/WorkflowsPreview/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$'); tally 'components_other' < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | rg -v '/Preview/|/WorkflowsPreview/'); tally 'root_builder' < <(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | rg -v '^src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/(Designer|Settings|Templates|components)/')
input.description: Split ActionPagesBuilder components Preview vs rest

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/Designer/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | head -5 && git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/Designer/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | while read f; do wc -l <"$f"; done | awk '{s+=$1} END {print "Designer_total", s, "files", NR}'

cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && echo "=== PublicActionPage breakdown ===" && for label path in "ActionPageView" "ActionPageView/hooks" "ActionPageView/utils" "components" "root"; do case $label in root) list=$(git ls-files 'src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/' | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$' | rg -v '^src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/(ActionPageView|components)/');; *) list=$(git ls-files "src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/$path/" 2>/dev/null | rg '\.(ts|tsx)$');; esac; n=0;l=0; while read f; do [ -z "$f" ]&&continue; n=$((n+1)); l=$((l+$(wc -l <"$f"))); done <<< "$list"; echo "$label ($path): files=$n lines=$l"; done

content.text:
Here is an exploration report for `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages` based on directory layout, routing, greps, and line counts from **git-tracked** `.ts` / `.tsx` files (summed with `wc` per folder).

---

## 1. Directory structure (high level)

```
/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/ActionPages/
├── useActionPagesRoutes.tsx          # Route registration for the whole feature area
└── pages/
    ├── index.ts                      # Re-exports ActionPages + Products listing pages
    ├── ActionPages/                  # Account-scoped **action page index** (table, filters, tags, bulk pause)
    ├── ActionPagesBuilder/         # **Builder** (drawer, designer, preview, settings, templates)
    ├── PublicActionPage/             # **Public donor-facing** action page runtime
    ├── PublicActionPageConfirmation/ # **Post-submit** confirmation UI
    ├── Submissions/                  # **Submissions** listing + filter drawer
    ├── Events/                       # **Events** hub (list + event detail, check-in, attendees)
    ├── StoreProducts/                # **Store / ACE** product management tied to storefront
    └── Products/                     # **Products** (GOAA – gated by account config)
```

`ActionPagesBuilder` is the largest subtree. Internally it clusters as:

- **`Designer/`** — left-panel configuration: **Design** (content + brand), **Finance** (amounts, funds, payment, product), **Form** (fields), **Workflows** (upgrade / recover / receipt), **Help** (external docs link).
- **`Settings/`** — embed, URL, SEO, social, page-specific values, analytics/tracking, optional custom CSS, **A/B testing** (feature-flagged).
- **`components/`** — **live preview** (`components/Preview`, ~155 files), **workflow previews** (`WorkflowsPreview`), shared **ActionPageForm** used in preview, **HeaderBar** (save, undo, billing agreement UI), **MediaManager**, **ConfigurationPanel**, contexts, etc.
- **`Templates/`** — template picker when `actionPagesBuilder.templates` is on.

---

## 2. Major sub-features (feature buckets)

| Bucket | Role |
|--------|------|
| **Action page list & admin** | `/action_pages/*` — browse pages, search, tags, schedule on/off, create/clone (via `ActionPages.tsx` + hooks/components). |
| **Builder / editor** | Full-screen drawer: `.../action_pages/:actionPageId/edit/*` — templates, design, finance, form, workflows, settings (see `ActionPagesBuilderDrawer.tsx`). |
| **Public rendering** | `PublicActionPage` — layout, content blocks, timers, FOTF variant, finance + form + payment blocks, express checkout, donor login, upgrades, exit intent, restricted flows. |
| **Donation / payment UX** | Amounts, funds, frequency/recurring, cover-the-fees, card + ACH + Plaid path + PayPal + Apple/Google Pay + Bitcoin (OpenNode); submission orchestration in `useActionPageBody.ts`. |
| **Form & validation** | Yup-based `useActionPageSchema` (+ shared `useCreatePaymentMethodFormSchema` from `@ui`), custom fields, employment/occupation, Turnstile field, event ticket fields when `isEvent`. |
| **Upsell / upgrade workflows** | Builder: pre-conversion upsell, post-conversion upgrade chains, recover, receipt email preview. Public: `UpgradeContainer`, `PreConversionUpsellModal`, post-submit upgrade behavior. |
| **A/B testing** | `Settings/components/ABTest/ABTest.tsx` — traffic allocation, targeting, exclusions, optional payment-method exclusions (incl. Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, “alt coins”); route gated by `actionPagesBuilder.settings.abTesting`. |
| **Confirmation** | `PublicActionPageConfirmation` — receipt-oriented UI, event tickets on confirmation, etc. |
| **Submissions** | Table + `SubmissionsFilterDrawer` for operator review. |
| **Events** | Events list/detail, tickets, attendee management, check-in, attendee detail sub-routes (`useActionPagesRoutes.tsx`). |
| **Store / storefront products** | `StoreProducts` — ACE + self-fulfilled flows, product drawer, filters; ties to storefront page type (finance routes drop “amounts”; design drops “content” for `storefront`). |
| **Products (GOAA)** | `Products` behind `AccountConfigGuard` `apGoaaEnabled`. |
| **Analytics / tracking (public)** | Hooks under `PublicActionPage/.../hooks/useAnalytics/` (e.g. Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, X pixel script). |
| **Compliance / risk** | Cloudflare **Turnstile**; optional **Kount** device data collection (`@kount/kount-web-client-sdk`) in `useActionPageBody.ts`. |

Lead vs donation vs storefront: builder **hides Finance** for lead pages, **hides upgrade workflow** for lead, **adjusts Design/Finance/Workflows** for storefront (`ActionPagesBuilderDrawer.tsx`, `Finance.tsx`, `Design.tsx`, `Workflows.tsx`).

---

## 3. Forms, multi-step flows, complex UI

- **Forms**: Widespread **react-hook-form** + **yup** (`useActionPageSchema` is large and conditional on donation vs event vs express checkout).
- **Multi-step / stepped UI**: **`useFormCarousel`** + **`SteppedFormSubmissionButton`** — carousel steps with “Next” / final donate CTA that includes amount and frequency in copy.
- **Express checkout block**: Login panels, donor saved payment methods (`useDonorPaymentMethods`, `PaymentMethodSection`), address sections, **CoverTheFees**, orchestration in **`ExpressCheckout`**, **`ExpressCheckoutForm`**, **`ExpressCheckoutButtons`**.
- **Complex layout variants**: Standard layout vs **`FOTFLayout`**, **`RestrictedActionPageLayout`** + **`RestrictedActionPagePaymentMethodForm`**, **`ActionPageContentBlocks`**, **`ActionPageExitIntent`**, **`UpgradeContainer`** (animations via **framer-motion**).
- **Preview / editor UI**: Rich **block-based preview** — header, footer, text, image, video, timer, impact, dividers, **form field previews** with **custom field editors** (select, question, hidden, etc.), **add block/section** flows, stories/tests.

---

## 4. Business logic & third-party integrations (in this tree)

**Present in `ActionPages` (not exhaustive of the whole monorepo):**

- **PayPal**: `@paypal/react-paypal-js`; `useExpressPayPal` calls public API for billing agreement token + agreement; sets `SubmissionPaymentMethods::Paypal`.
- **Apple Pay**: `ApplePaySession`, merchant validation via `/public/v3/applepay_payments`, token → `SubmissionPaymentMethods::Applepay`.
- **Google Pay**: `@google-pay/button-react`; `useExpressGooglePay`; `SubmissionPaymentMethods::Googlepay`.
- **Plaid (ACH)**: Feature flag `settings.usePlaidBankAccountVerification`; payment type `plaid_bank_account` / `SubmissionPaymentMethods::Plaid`; legacy **Yodlee** mentioned in comments only (whitelist / limits).
- **Credit card / bank account**: Types and schema; **Stripe is not referenced** under this folder — tokenization / `PaymentMethodForm` likely lives under `@ui` / services.
- **Bitcoin (OpenNode)**: `bitcoin_open_node`, `ExpressOpenNodeButton`, builder `Payment.tsx` toggle `bitcoinOpenNodeEnabled`; special-casing in `useActionPageBody` (no recurring, redirect/callback behavior).
- **Cloudflare Turnstile**: `TurnstileChallenge`, `useTurnstile`, schema field `cfTurnstileResponse`.
- **Kount**: Optional SDK init with `VITE_KOUNT_*` when `actionPages.enableKount`.
- **PayPal overlay / modals**: Comments and DOM filtering in `PreConversionUpsellModal` for PayPal fullscreen behavior.
- **Client crypto**: `encrypt` from `@service/anedot/utils/encrypt` in submission path; `currency.js`, `splitExpDate`, `waitForSettledCharge`, etc.
- **Observability**: Rollbar in Apple Pay and other paths.
- **Venmo**: Typed in `getActionPageInitialValues` as optional `expressCheckoutMethod` only (no dedicated button file found in this folder in the grep sweep).

---

## 5. Approximate scale (components & lines of code)

| Area | `.ts`/`.tsx` files (tracked) | Approx. lines (tracked) |
|------|----------------------------|---------------------------|
| **ActionPagesBuilder** | 463 | **~33,000** |
| **PublicActionPage** | 158 | **~13,300** |
| **StoreProducts** | 34 | **~3,500** |
| **Events** | 40 | **~3,000** |
| **pages/ActionPages** (index/table) | 19 | **~1,500** |
| **Products** | 14 | **~730** |
| **Submissions** | 11 | **~530** |
| **PublicActionPageConfirmation** | 2 | **~280** |
| **Routes + small root** | handful | **~130** (non-`pages/` under `ActionPages`) |

**Total (this folder, tracked TS/TS): ~55,800 lines** across **~744 TS/TSX files** (matches a full `wc` over `git ls-files` for that path).

**Inside ActionPagesBuilder (illustrative split):**

| Slice | Approx. lines (tracked) |
|-------|-------------------------|
| **Designer/** (all panels + nested) | **~11,400** |
| **components/Preview/** | **~8,200** |
| **components/** (non-Preview / non-WorkflowsPreview) | **~5,200** |
| **components/WorkflowsPreview/** | **~2,500** |
| **Designer/Finance/** | **~3,700** |
| **Designer/Workflows/** | **~3,100** |
| **Designer/Form/** | **~2,400** |
| **Designer/Design/** | **~1,700** |
| **Settings/** | **~1,800** |
| **Templates/** | **~690** |
| **Builder root** (drawer, main shell, hooks, etc.) | **~3,200** |

`PublicActionPage` is concentrated in **`useActionPageBody.ts` (~1070 lines)** orchestrating submit payloads, payment method branches, upgrades, polling, Turnstile reset, plus **`useActionPageSchema.ts` (600+ lines)**.

---

## 6. Builder / editor functionality (summary)

- **Structural editor**: Block/section preview, add/remove blocks, **undo/redo** (HeaderBar), **editable** receipt preview, timer/banner/editor blocks, media manager integration.
- **Configuration panels**: Design (content + branding), Finance (presets, recurring, futures pledges, funds, payment method toggles, GOAA product), Form (field ordering, alignment, controls), Workflows (upgrade index, amount overrides at breakpoints, pre/post conversion upsells, recover messages, receipt).
- **Settings**: Embed code, slug/URL, SEO schema, social, custom params, analytics, CSS, **A/B test** UI.
- **Templates**: Separate entry when feature flag enables it.
- **Live preview**: `LivePreview`, `LiveFinancePreview`, synchronized with react-hook-form **form context** for the editable action page.

---

## Complexity indicators (short)

| Dimension | Indicator |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Forms** | Very high — conditional Yup schema across payment types, events, employment, Turnstile, express vs card. |
| **Payments** | High — many methods + feature flags + upgrade-chain rules; relies on **`@ui` payment method form** for card/ACH details. |
| **Multi-step** | Medium — carousel stepped form + separate upgrade funnel pages. |
| **Integrations** | High — PayPal SDK, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Plaid path, OpenNode, Turnstile, Kount, multiple analytics pixels. |
| **Fundraising semantics** | High — recurring, cover fees, funds, breakpoints, storefront vs donation vs lead, local donor session, charge settlement wait. |

If you want, a follow-up can map **exact public URL entry components** (`PublicActionPage.tsx` chain) or list **every `Designer/Finance`** submodule file-by-file; that would mirror the same read-only methodology with more granular file listing.

[REDACTED]
